item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Masyarakat di sini lebih menyadari bahwa keamanan bersifat relatif, dan larangan tertentu terhadap ekspresi bisa membuat rasa tidak aman meningkat.

notes: Agent A begins with clear support for society-priority and remains somewhat supportive, but moves toward a more conditional position by acknowledging abuse-of-authority criticism and risks from expression limits. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, especially on free expression and anti-terrorism/security limits, while acknowledging balance only minimally.
